body.title: Fix palace nodes missing updated_at timestamps (11 nodes)
body.result: Verified: SELECT count(*) FROM adc.palace WHERE updated_at IS NULL returns 0
body.description:
palace-decay-detection audit finds 11 adc.palace nodes with no updated_at timestamp. These are likely older nodes that pre-date the column. Set updated_at = created_at (or now()) for those rows.

**Affected files:** adc.palace table (DB only)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; Postgres only
**Scope boundary:** IN — UPDATE adc.palace SET updated_at = now() WHERE updated_at IS NULL; OUT — don't change content
**Completion criteria:** SELECT count(*) FROM adc.palace WHERE updated_at IS NULL returns 0
